# Developer Productivity Dashboard

## Value Proposition
A real-time dashboard that aggregates developer activity across GitHub, Jira, and Slack
to surface productivity insights and team health metrics. Reduces manager overhead by
automating status updates and identifying blocked developers early.

## Target Audience
Engineering managers and tech leads at mid-size companies (50-500 engineers).
Secondary audience: individual developers wanting self-improvement metrics.

## Problem Statement
Engineering managers spend 5+ hours per week manually collecting status updates from
multiple tools. They often miss early signs of developer burnout or project blockers
until it's too late.

## Key Features
1. Cross-platform activity aggregation (GitHub, Jira, Slack)
2. Real-time team health dashboard
3. Automated standup report generation
4. Burnout early warning system
5. Integration with existing CI/CD pipelines
